name: hackify-marketplace
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the hackify plugin — one end-to-end dev workflow for every task.

plugins.name: hackify
plugins.description: One unified end-to-end dev workflow for any task — feature, bug fix, refactor, redesign, debug, or research. Single per-task markdown work-doc captures spec, plan, progress, review, and post-mortem in one file.
